_doc: Perception caps. Read via config/ranges.js (not this file directly). Distance values are in blocks; the string "chunkLoad" means the server's loaded-chunk radius in blocks (serverViewDistance*16) — the hard perception ceiling, resolved at runtime. Angles are in degrees.

_fields.sight.playerVisibility: Max range to LOS-test the named chat player for PLAYER=...(visible/NOT_VISIBLE). chunkLoad = see them as far as chunks load.
_fields.sight.nearbyEntities: Range for the nearby= mob/entity list (LOS-gated). chunkLoad = full loaded range.
_fields.sight.ambientSurveyBlocks: Range of the standing-context survey (exposure-culled chunk scan + LOS) that feeds VISION= see=. Per-tick cost; exposure cull keeps candidate count low so range can be larger. Profile before pushing past ~64.
_fields.sight.ambientFovDegrees: Field-of-view cone (full angle) for the standing survey. (FOV-vs-omni still under discussion.)
_fields.sight.ambientSurveyCap: Memory ceiling on exposed candidates per ambient survey (nearest-first), NOT a range limiter and NOT the LOS budget. Keep well above the in-range exposed-shell size (open ocean at r64 can be >8000) or distant types get clipped. LOS cost is bounded separately by ambientVisibleCap in surveyVisible.
_fields.sight.ambientVisibleCap: Per-type visible cap (K) for the ambient survey. A block type is LOS-tested nearest-first until it has >K verified-visible blocks, then reported as 'many' and skipped (the LOS cost bound). Types under K are counted exactly. Lower = cheaper + coarser; higher = more exact counts before 'many'.
_fields.sight.lookBlocks: [ACTION:look] block search range (palette scan, cheap to the ceiling).
_fields.sight.lookReportCap: Max visible hits [ACTION:look] reports before stopping.
_fields.sight.rayScanBlocks: castVisionRays distance for the periodic ray sweep (DB/biome) and [ACTION:scan].
_fields.hearing.soundSubtitles: Max range to surface a heard sound as a subtitle.
